frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment:
A: Main to apne bete aur pote dono se kehti hoon, aajkal shaadi bahut soch samajh kar karo.
B: Kyon didi?
A: Ab kanoon sab aurat ke paksh mein ho gaya hai, kal ko mann badal gaya to aadmi ki kamai par haq jata deti hain. 498A ka bhi kitna galat istemal hota hai, isliye ladkon ko pehle se sambhal ke rehna chahiye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as potential financial exploiters of men and presents legal protections like 498A as tools women misuse. It encodes victimhood inversion, legal framing, and generalization about 'aajkal' women.
original_frame: Dress Code: Traditional Equal Respectable, Other Equal Questionable.
persona_text: You are Kamala. Age 62. A retired woman in a joint family in Varanasi. Your grandson just got engaged to a girl named Ritu who works in Delhi. The family met Ritu for the first time at the engagement ceremony last week. Ritu came wearing an indo western outfit instead of a traditional saree. You are sitting with two of your sisters in law the morning after and telling them what you thought of Ritu's outfit and what it tells you about the kind of daughter in law she will be and whether she respects the family's values.
